title: FMD: Play/Stop/Play sequence should produce audio tone on second Play
steps: Verify audio tone is heard from the device
Observe audio output from the device
expected: Audio tone is clearly heard from the device on the second Play press, with no distortion, noise, or stacked/multiple tones playing simultaneously.

title: FMD: Pause button visibility after Play/Stop/Play sequence
steps: Verify Pause button is visible and enabled
Verify Pause button is no longer visible (or is disabled)
Check the UI for the Pause button
expected: The Pause button is visible and functional after the second Play press. It should not disappear or become permanently hidden after the Play/Stop/Play sequence.

title: FMD: Device connection stability after multiple Play/Stop cycles
steps: After each cycle, verify device connection status remains 'Connected'
After all cycles, press Play and verify audio tone is produced
Press Stop and verify tone stops
expected: Device remains connected ('Connected' status) throughout all Play/Stop cycles. Audio tone is correctly produced and stopped on each cycle without degradation, noise, or stacked tones.

title: FMD: Rapid sequential Play -> Stop -> Play button presses
steps: Immediately press Play button again (within 1 second)
Observe audio output from the device
Check UI for Pause button visibility
expected: The second Play press produces a clean audio tone. No stacked or overlapping tones are heard. The Pause button remains visible. Device connection status remains 'Connected'. No UI glitches or application crashes occur.

title: FMD: Audio output integrity after Play/Stop/Play sequence
steps: Press Play and record audio tone characteristics (frequency, volume, clarity)
Compare audio tone characteristics from second Play with the first Play recording
Listen for any artifacts, noise, distortion, or multiple overlapping tones
expected: Audio tone on the second Play matches the first Play in frequency, volume, and clarity. No stacked tones, background noise, distortion, or artifacts are present. The audio output is identical to the initial Play.

title: FMD: Pause button functionality after Play/Stop/Play sequence
steps: Verify audio tone resumes from paused position
expected: Pause button is visible and functional after the Play/Stop/Play sequence. Pressing Pause pauses the tone, and pressing Play resumes it correctly. No UI or functional degradation occurs.
